commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex-specific MCP metadata under `mcp.servers.<name>.codex`, filters Codex app-server user MCP projections by active agent, maps Codex approval modes, and updates schema, docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows Codex app-server projects every configured user MCP server, and the PR head source plus proof show agent-filtered projection with fail-closed handling for empty or invalid scopes.
